description: Execute V0.7-M2 by drafting the unified model of artifacts, task lifecycles, and semantic bounds for the collaboration protocol.
scope: Generate a comprehensive design document (tasks/v0.7-m2-unified-model.md). The document MUST explicitly answer the 6 defining questions from the M2 directive (Artifact taxonomy, Task lifecycle, Reviewer vs. Gatekeeper, Acceptance vs. Evaluation, Personal vs. Team mode core, and Low cognitive load principles). Provide a clear, executable lifecycle rather than an abstract glossary.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of .agent-state/ physical migrations. NO modifications to src/ or MCP server capabilities. NO automated execution scripts or review automation scripts. NO modification of the active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models. NO environmental adapter builds.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify the MCP server logic.
Attempting to alter current dispatch.json semantics.
Executing without an approved M2 contract.
